sourceTitle: Central Kitchen Weekly Schedule (Week A notebook)

checklists.title: Tuesday — CK Prep
items: Defrost prawns for dumplings (add cracked pepper & salt)
Bake 30kg pumpkins — 160°C, 10 mins × 4 times
Drain 40 tins chickpeas for patty (bake the other tray for pumpkin hummus as well)
Drain 13 tins chickpeas for hummus
Collect dumplings
Pumpkin patty mix
Pumpkin hummus × 2 recipe
Pickled onion — all peeled red onion; steal pickled cabbage juice
Ranch hand delivery to MB — put it away

checklists.title: Wednesday — Logistics & Van Run
items: 9am — Pick up van (Bibi's place)
MB: Pick up beef, all containers (also MHP containers), 40 shots coffee, coriander roots (ask May)
CK: Pick up all stocks and dirty towels
HS: Delivery, pick up all containers, cleaned towels
CK: Unload all containers, load MHP stocks & rubbish, pumpkin patty mix, press & disc
MHP: Unload, run rubbish
Bibi's: Return van
MB: Make pumpkin patty
CK: Bring all pumpkin patty back to CK, marinate pull beef; coriander roots under shelf in GN tray

checklists.title: Thursday — CK Prep
items: Bake pull beef FIRST — 160°C, 20% steam, flip (if not ready by 3.30pm: 90°C, 20% steam, bake 5 hours)
Defrost dough; make dough if needed (check every 1.5 hours)
Pork prawn dumplings — 20kg
Bacon jam — cook (see recipe in training)
Charge all chargers

checklists.title: Friday — Delivery (Hampton Park)
items: 7.30am — Drain beef; mix with all bacon jam evenly
8.30am — Deliver to Hampton Park: pull beef, containers & lids, 2 small scales, 80g pull beef juice (charge big scales)
Drain chickpea
Pumpkin hummus
Japanese dressing — 7 bottles only
